name: FeedBack
short_description: This game offers a classic pixel art style, taking players on a nostalgic and charming adventure.
detailed_description: This game offers a classic pixel art style, taking players on a nostalgic and charming adventure. You play as a brave hero wielding a large sword, navigating through a map with a brownish hue using the ASWD keys. In this world full of mysteries, your goal is to search for scattered treasure chests and gold coins. However, each treasure chest is not easily obtained; they are typically guarded by fierce pirates. Players must use their wits and courage to cleverly avoid the pirates’ sight, allowing them to safely approach and open the chests. The background music is lively and adventurous, and when you successfully acquire a treasure chest or coin, a satisfying sound effect enhances the immersive and fun experience.
